ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Winnifred Gin in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that a Report was filed with a hearing date of October 17, 2012. The Court also advised Ms. Gin that there was a problem with the Inventory and Appraisal that was filed with respect to the mutual funds because it was not submitted to a Probate Referee, stated that the biggest problem was that distribution has been made without Court approval and recommended that Ms. Gin hire an Attorney. Today's status hearing was taken off calendar. The hearing date on the Report was continued from October 17, 2012 to October 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
